entities.name: GFSAD30SEACE
entities.description: A data product providing cropland extent data over Southeast and Northeast Asia at 30 meter resolution

entities.name: CROPLAND EXTENT
entities.description: The spatial extent of land used for agricultural crops

entities.name: SOUTHEAST ASIA
entities.description: Geographic region covered by the GFSAD30SEACE data product

entities.name: NORTHEAST ASIA
entities.description: Geographic region covered by the GFSAD30SEACE data product

entities.name: POLICYMAKING
entities.description: The process of formulating policies, for which cropland extent monitoring is critical

entities.name: WATER SUSTAINABILITY
entities.description: The management of water resources to ensure long-term availability, studied using cropland extent data

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: RANDOM FOREST
entities.description: A pixel-based supervised classifier used to retrieve cropland extent

entities.name: LANDSAT 8 OPERATIONAL LAND IMAGER
entities.description: A satellite sensor used as a data source for retrieving cropland extent

entities.name: LANDSAT 7 ENHANCED THEMATIC MAPPER PLUS
entities.description: A satellite sensor used as a data source for retrieving cropland extent

entities.name: SHUTTLE RADAR TOPOGRAPHY MISSION
entities.description: A mission providing elevation data used for retrieving cropland extent

entities.name: WATER BODIES
entities.description: Areas of water defined within the GFSAD30SEACE cropland extent layer
